home.metaTitle: TaxiNeo — Fixed-Price Taxi 24/7 | Licensed Drivers | France
home.metaDescription: Book a licensed taxi in seconds. Fixed price guaranteed, professional drivers, available 24/7 in over 50 French cities. No surprises — try TaxiNeo today.
home.heroTitle2: Fixed price, known before you ride.
home.heroSubtitle: Real taxi drivers — not rideshare. You know how much you'll pay before you even leave.
home.servicesSubtitle: Your fixed-price taxi, anywhere in France
home.serviceFixedDesc: Book your taxi in seconds. Fixed fare guaranteed, no surprises.
home.step1Desc: Enter your pickup and drop-off points. The app instantly shows you available taxis nearby.
home.step2Desc: Compare fares, read reviews and select the driver that suits you. Fixed price, no surprises.
home.step3Desc: Track your driver's approach in real time, get in and enjoy. Payment is automatic via the app.
home.feature1Desc: Not a delivery driver turned chauffeur. A real taxi with a professional license, annual vehicle inspection, and mandatory training. You know exactly who you're riding with.
home.feature2Desc: Prices set by the government, not an algorithm. A Friday night costs the same as a Tuesday morning. Even during events, strikes, or peak demand.
home.feature3Desc: Bus lanes, priority routes. During traffic jams, a TaxiNeo taxi keeps moving. A rideshare is stuck in traffic like everyone else.
home.testimonial1: No more fare surprises. With TaxiNeo, I know exactly what I'll pay, even during rush hour. The driver knew the way perfectly.
home.testimonial2: I use TaxiNeo for all my business trips. The Business option with automatic billing saves me so much time. Impeccable service.
home.testimonial3: As a mom, safety is essential. Knowing that TaxiNeo drivers are licensed professionals gives me complete peace of mind. Highly recommend!
home.businessDesc: Simplify your team's mobility. Centralized dashboard, consolidated billing, customizable travel policies.
home.citiesTitle: Book a taxi in your city
home.faq1Q: What's the difference between a TaxiNeo taxi and a rideshare?
home.faq1A: A TaxiNeo taxi is an official, licensed taxi authorized by the local prefecture. Unlike rideshare services, our drivers have access to bus lanes, taxi stands, and benefit from government-regulated fares — no surge pricing.
home.faq2Q: How does the fixed price work?
home.faq2A: Enter your pickup and destination, and TaxiNeo displays a firm price before you book. This price doesn't change regardless of traffic or actual trip duration. You pay exactly what's shown.
home.faq3Q: Is TaxiNeo available in my city?
home.faq3A: TaxiNeo operates in over 50 French cities including Paris, Lyon, Marseille, Bordeaux, Toulouse, Nice, and Lille. We also cover major airports and train stations. Enter your address to check availability.
home.faq4Q: How can I pay for my ride?
home.faq4A: You can pay by credit card (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, or Google Pay directly through the app. Payment is secure and automatic at the end of the ride.
home.faq5Q: Can I book a taxi in advance?
home.faq5A: Yes, you can book immediately or schedule a ride in advance. Choose your date and time, and a driver will be assigned. Ideal for airport transfers or important appointments.
home.faq6Q: What happens if I cancel my ride?
home.faq6A: Cancellation is free if made before a driver is assigned. Once the driver is en route, cancellation fees may apply. Check our terms for more details.

cities.faq1Q: In how many cities is TaxiNeo available?
cities.faq1A: TaxiNeo is available in the 50 largest cities in France, across 13 regions. Each city has licensed professional drivers ready to transport you 24/7.
cities.faq2Q: How do I book a taxi in my city?
cities.faq2A: Click on your city on the map, enter your pick-up and drop-off addresses, choose the date and time, then confirm your booking. You'll receive instant confirmation.
cities.faq3Q: Are fares the same in all cities?
cities.faq3A: Fares are regulated by the prefecture and may vary slightly between cities. You always receive a fixed quote before confirming your booking, with no surprises.
cities.faq4Q: Can I book a taxi for a trip between two cities?
cities.faq4A: Yes, TaxiNeo offers long-distance trips between French cities. Simply enter your departure city and destination to get a flat-rate fare.
cities.seoTitle1: Taxis in France: a regulated and reliable transport service
cities.seoText1: In France, taxis are a regulated public transport service. Every taxi driver must hold a professional licence issued by the local prefecture, guaranteeing their training, insurance and compliance with regulated fares. Unlike ride-hailing services (VTC), taxis benefit from dedicated lanes in major cities, designated taxi ranks and the right to pick up passengers on the street. With TaxiNeo, you gain access to this network of licensed professional drivers across the 50 largest cities in France, with the convenience of online booking at a fixed price.
cities.seoTitle2: Taxi fares in France: how does it work?
cities.seoText2: Taxi fares in France are set by prefectural order and regulated by law. They include a pick-up charge (typically between 2 and 4 euros), a per-kilometre rate (between 1.10 and 1.60 euros depending on the time and day) and an hourly waiting rate. Three tariffs apply depending on conditions: tariff A for daytime urban rides, tariff B for night-time or Sunday rides, and tariff C for trips outside the municipality. TaxiNeo simplifies this fare structure by offering you a fixed price before each booking, calculated on the basis of the current regulated fares.
cities.seoText3a: City rides: quick daily trips for your professional, medical or personal appointments. Our drivers know the shortcuts and dedicated lanes to optimise every journey.
cities.seoText3b: Airport and station transfers: home pick-up or arrival pick-up, real-time flight or train tracking, luggage assistance. Special packages for trips to and from France's main airports and stations.
cities.seoText3c: Long distance: travel comfortably between French cities at a negotiated rate. Ideal for business trips or events. Flat-rate fare communicated before departure.
cities.seoText3d: Medical transport: adapted transport to hospitals and clinics with attentive care. Covered by French social security under certain conditions. Vehicles equipped for patient comfort.
cities.faq5A: Yes, our drivers accept pets in most cases. We recommend mentioning this when booking so the driver can prepare the vehicle accordingly.
cities.faq6Q: How can I pay for my TaxiNeo taxi?
cities.faq6A: You can pay for your ride by bank card directly in the taxi, in cash, or by online payment when booking. All our vehicles are equipped with electronic payment terminals.
cities.faq7Q: Can I book a taxi for a medical trip?
cities.faq7A: Yes, TaxiNeo offers a medical transport service covered by French social security. With a medical prescription, your trips to hospitals and clinics can be reimbursed. Contact us to learn more.
cities.faq8A: Absolutely. We offer solutions tailored to businesses: corporate accounts, monthly invoicing, detailed reporting and negotiated rates. Ideal for your employees' and clients' travel needs.
cities.crossLinksDesc: TaxiNeo goes beyond city rides. Explore our specialised transfer services for airports and train stations across France.

airports.title: Airport taxi transfer
airports.subtitle: Fixed fares, real-time flight tracking, meet and greet in the arrivals area. Hover over a region to locate its airports on the map.
airports.metaTitle: Airport Taxi - Fixed-fare transfers to 50 French airports
airports.metaDescription: Book your taxi transfer to and from the 50 main airports in France. Fixed fares, real-time flight tracking, personalised meet and greet. Available 24/7.
airports.howItWorksTitle: How to book your airport transfer
airports.step1Desc: Select your departure or arrival airport from the 50 main French airports covered by our network.
airports.step2Desc: Provide your flight number, destination address and preferred time. Receive a flat-rate fare instantly.
airports.step3Desc: Your driver tracks your flight in real time and meets you with a name board in the arrivals area. Luggage assistance included.
airports.adv1Desc: Our drivers have expert knowledge of every airport's access roads and terminals. They guarantee a fast, stress-free transfer.
airports.adv2Desc: The price is fixed in advance, regardless of traffic or journey time. No hidden charges, even if your flight is delayed.
airports.adv3Desc: We track your flight to adjust the pick-up time. If your flight is delayed or early, your driver adjusts automatically.
airports.adv4Desc: Your driver meets you in the arrivals area with a name board. Luggage assistance and a complimentary bottle of water included.
airports.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about airport transfers
airports.faq1Q: How does the airport taxi transfer work?
airports.faq1A: Book online by entering your airport, flight number and address. Your driver tracks your flight in real time and meets you at the exit with a name board.
airports.faq2A: Yes, the fare is fixed in advance and does not change, even in case of traffic jams or flight delays. You know the exact price before booking.
airports.faq3Q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
airports.faq3A: We track your flight in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts their arrival time. No extra charge is applied for delays.
airports.faq4Q: Can I book a transfer for a group?
airports.faq4A: Yes, we offer vehicles suited for groups (vans, minibuses). Indicate the number of passengers when booking to receive a tailored quote.
airports.seoTitle1: Airport taxi transfers in France: travel stress-free
airports.seoText1: Every year, over 200 million passengers travel through French airports. Arriving at or departing from the airport can be stressful, especially when dealing with luggage, connections and tight schedules. An airport taxi transfer with TaxiNeo removes that worry: your professional driver tracks your flight in real time, adapts to any delays and meets you with a name board in the arrivals area. No extra charge for flight delays, guaranteed flat-rate fare, luggage assistance included.
airports.seoText1b: Our drivers serve the 50 main airports in France, from major international hubs like Paris-CDG, Orly, Nice-Côte d'Azur and Lyon-Saint Exupéry to regional airports like Nantes-Atlantique, Bordeaux-Mérignac or Strasbourg-Entzheim. Whatever your departure or arrival airport, TaxiNeo guarantees a punctual and comfortable transfer.
airports.seoTitle2: Why choose a taxi over public transport for the airport?
airports.seoText2a: Door-to-door: the taxi picks you up at your home or office and drops you off directly at the terminal, with no connections or extra waiting. Significant time savings, especially with bulky luggage.
airports.seoText2b: Available 24/7: shuttles and public transport don't always run at night or early in the morning. Taxis are available at all hours, 365 days a year, for your early flights or late arrivals.
airports.seoText2c: Comfort and peace of mind: room for your luggage, air conditioning, clean vehicle and professional driver. You arrive at the airport rested and on time, without the stress of crowded transport.
airports.seoText2d: Cost-effective for groups: for 2 to 4 passengers, a taxi is often cheaper than individual shuttle tickets, while offering a much more convenient door-to-door service.
airports.faq5Q: How far in advance should I book an airport transfer?
airports.faq5A: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to guarantee availability. However, you can book up to 30 days before your flight. For last-minute bookings, contact us and we'll do our best.
airports.faq6Q: Can the driver help with my luggage?
airports.faq6A: Yes, luggage assistance is included in all our airport transfers. Your driver helps you load and unload your suitcases. For large amounts of luggage, please mention it when booking.
airports.faq7Q: How does the airport meet & greet work?
airports.faq7A: Your driver waits in the arrivals area with a name board. They track your flight in real time and adjust their arrival time accordingly. You receive their contact details by SMS so you can reach them easily.
airports.faq8Q: Do you provide child seats in airport taxis?
airports.faq8A: Yes, on request when booking, we can provide a baby seat, booster seat or both. This service is free of charge and allows families to travel safely.

stations.title: Train station taxi transfer
stations.subtitle: Fixed fares, real-time train tracking, meet at the station exit. Hover over a region to locate its stations on the map.
stations.metaTitle: Station Taxi - Fixed-fare transfers to 50 French stations
stations.metaDescription: Book your taxi transfer to and from the 50 main train stations in France. Fixed fares, real-time train tracking, personalised meet and greet. Available 24/7.
stations.howItWorksTitle: How to book your station transfer
stations.step1Desc: Select your departure or arrival station from the 50 main French train stations covered by our network.
stations.step2Desc: Provide your train number, destination address and arrival time. Receive a flat-rate fare instantly.
stations.step3Desc: Your driver tracks your train in real time and meets you at the station exit. Luggage assistance included.
stations.adv1Desc: Our drivers have expert knowledge of every station's access points and exits. Fast, stress-free transfer guaranteed.
stations.adv2Desc: The price is fixed in advance and does not change, even in traffic. No meter, no surprises on arrival.
stations.adv3Desc: We track your train to adjust the pick-up time. If your train is delayed, your driver adapts automatically.
stations.adv4Desc: Your driver meets you directly at the station exit. Luggage assistance included for a comfortable transfer.
stations.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about station transfers
stations.faq1Q: How do I book a taxi from a station?
stations.faq1A: Select your station on the map, enter your destination and arrival time. You'll receive a flat-rate fare and instant confirmation by email.
stations.faq2Q: How much does a taxi transfer from the station cost?
stations.faq2A: The fare depends on the distance between the station and your destination. You receive a flat-rate quote before booking, with no hidden charges.
stations.faq3Q: What happens if my train is delayed?
stations.faq3A: We track your train in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts their arrival time. No extra charge is applied for delays.
stations.faq4Q: Does the driver wait for me at the station exit?
stations.faq4A: Yes, your driver meets you directly at the main exit of the station. They can help you with your luggage to the vehicle.
stations.seoTitle1: Station taxi transfers: the most practical solution
stations.seoText1: Every day, millions of travellers arrive at train stations across France. Whether you're travelling by TGV, Intercités, TER or Ouigo, the last-mile question always arises: how do you get from the station to your home, hotel or meeting? A taxi remains the fastest and most comfortable solution. With TaxiNeo, your driver tracks your train in real time and meets you directly at the station exit, ready to handle your luggage.
stations.seoText1b: Our network covers the 50 main train stations in France: from the major Parisian stations (Gare du Nord, Gare de Lyon, Gare Montparnasse, Gare de l'Est, Gare Saint-Lazare) to regional stations like Lyon Part-Dieu, Marseille Saint-Charles, Bordeaux Saint-Jean, Lille-Flandres or Strasbourg. Flat-rate fares communicated before booking, with no surprises on arrival.
stations.seoTitle2: Taxi vs ride-hailing at the station: what's the difference?
stations.seoText2a: Regulated fares: taxis apply fares set by the prefecture, transparent and regulated by law. Ride-hailing services set their own prices, which can vary with demand (surge pricing).
stations.seoText2b: Priority access: taxis have dedicated ranks directly at station exits, with privileged access. No need to wait for a vehicle in a remote pick-up zone.
stations.seoText2c: Dedicated lanes: in major cities, taxis use bus lanes, significantly reducing journey time, especially during rush hours.
stations.seoText2d: Guaranteed professionalism: taxi drivers hold a professional licence issued by the prefecture, certifying their training, clean criminal record and professional insurance.
stations.faq5Q: Does the driver really track my train in real time?
stations.faq5A: Yes, thanks to our tracking system, your driver knows your train's arrival time in real time. In case of delay, they automatically adjust their pick-up time. No extra charge is applied.
stations.faq6Q: Can I book a taxi for a round trip to the station?
stations.faq6A: Yes, you can book a round trip. Simply enter both journeys when booking. You'll receive a flat-rate fare for each trip, communicated in advance.
stations.faq7Q: Is there an extra charge for bulky luggage?
stations.faq7A: No, luggage assistance is included in all our station transfers. Whether you have one suitcase or several, your driver helps you load them. For exceptional volumes (bicycle, pushchair), mention it when booking.
stations.faq8Q: How do I find my driver at the station?
stations.faq8A: Your driver waits at the main exit of the station. You receive their details (name, phone number, vehicle make and colour) by SMS and email after booking.

taxiVsVtc.metaTitle: Taxi vs Rideshare — Complete Comparison 2026 | TaxiNeo
taxiVsVtc.metaDescription: Taxi or rideshare? Discover the differences in fares, regulations, availability and service quality. Why taxis remain the most reliable choice in France.
taxiVsVtc.heroTitle: Taxi vs Rideshare: the complete comparison
taxiVsVtc.heroSubtitle: Regulated or dynamic fares, bus lane access or not, guaranteed availability or demand-dependent — the differences between taxis and rideshare services are significant. Discover why more and more people in France are choosing taxis for their daily commutes and airport transfers.
taxiVsVtc.advantage1Desc: Taxis apply fares set by local authorities, with no demand-based variation. Unlike rideshare services that use surge pricing, your taxi fare stays the same whether it's raining, snowing or New Year's Eve. You know exactly what you'll pay before you get in.
taxiVsVtc.advantage2Desc: Taxis are the only private transport vehicles allowed to use bus lanes in France. This is a decisive advantage in city centers during rush hour: while a rideshare sits in traffic, your taxi speeds through the reserved lane, saving you 20-40% travel time.
taxiVsVtc.advantage3Desc: Airport taxi transfers benefit from regulated flat rates: €56 right bank / €65 left bank for Paris-CDG, €37 / €44 for Paris-Orly. These prices are fixed, predictable and traffic-independent. The same trip by rideshare can cost from €45 to over €120 depending on demand.
taxiVsVtc.advantage4Desc: Taxis can pick up passengers on the street and at taxi stands, in addition to online bookings. Rideshare services can only legally operate through advance bookings. With TaxiNeo, get the best of both worlds: online booking with all taxi advantages.
taxiVsVtc.advantage5Desc: Every taxi driver holds a professional license issued by local authorities after examination. This license guarantees city knowledge, advanced road code expertise and passenger transport rules. Rideshare drivers don't have this territorial license requirement.
taxiVsVtc.advantage6Desc: With over 55,000 taxis across France, coverage is nationwide and permanent, including rural areas and small towns. Rideshare services mainly concentrate on major cities, leaving many areas underserved.
taxiVsVtc.compRow2Taxi: Access granted — time savings in the city
taxiVsVtc.faqTitle: Everything about the differences between taxis and rideshare
taxiVsVtc.faq1Q: Is a taxi really cheaper than a rideshare?
taxiVsVtc.faq1A: In most cases, yes. Taxi fares are regulated and don't fluctuate with demand. A rideshare service can apply a multiplier of 1.5x to 3x during high demand (rain, events, rush hour). For airport transfers, taxis are consistently more affordable thanks to regulated flat rates.
taxiVsVtc.faq2Q: Why do taxis have bus lane access but rideshare services don't?
taxiVsVtc.faq2A: Taxis are considered a public individual transport service. As such, they benefit from reserved lane access to provide fast service to passengers. Rideshare services, as purely private businesses, don't have this advantage. This is a legal distinction enshrined in the French Transport Code.
taxiVsVtc.faq3Q: Can I book a taxi through an app like a rideshare?
taxiVsVtc.faq3A: Absolutely. With TaxiNeo, you book your taxi in a few clicks, just like a rideshare app. The difference: you get regulated fares, bus lane access and drivers with professional licenses. It's the best of both worlds.
taxiVsVtc.faq4A: Yes, all TaxiNeo partner taxis accept card payment, Apple Pay and Google Pay, with no surcharge. Payment is secure and you automatically receive a receipt by email. No more taxis refusing cards — with TaxiNeo, it's guaranteed.
taxiVsVtc.faq5Q: Are rideshare vehicles more comfortable than taxis?
taxiVsVtc.faq5A: TaxiNeo taxi vehicles are recent, clean and perfectly maintained. Sedans, SUVs and vans are available to suit your needs. The comfort difference with rideshare services has become marginal, while the fare advantage and speed (bus lanes) clearly favor taxis.
taxiVsVtc.ctaSubtitle: Fixed fares, bus lanes, licensed drivers — the smart choice
